component.name: Resolve AAC Tools
component.summary: Remux AAC audio for DaVinci Resolve and drive it from the system tray

description.p: DaVinci Resolve on Linux cannot import AAC audio directly. Resolve AAC Tools watches your media, remuxes AAC into a Resolve-friendly container, and adds a system tray to control the watchers, launch Resolve, and fix AAC audio in rendered exports.
A guided settings window helps configure watchers, export remuxing, cache paths, native file dialogs, and optional Resolve menu scripts.

ul.li: Automatic AAC remuxing for imports, the media pool, and the timeline
Export watcher that repairs AAC audio in rendered files
System tray with launch actions, toggles, cache settings, and logs
Modern welcome and settings window for first-run setup
Native KDE file dialogs and Resolve launch helpers
